name: PhishScan — Phishing Detection CLI
origin: Built after spending hours manually parsing phishing emails in SOC workflows. Automates the parts that don't need human attention.
description: A Python CLI tool that analyzes email headers, URLs, and domain patterns to score phishing likelihood. Extracts IOCs and generates incident-ready reports.

name: ThreatBoard — IOC Dashboard
origin: Born from the need to see attacker infrastructure as a connected graph, not a flat list of indicators.
description: A browser-based threat intelligence dashboard for visualizing IOC clusters, campaign timelines, and attacker infrastructure relationships. Searchable IOC table, ATT&CK-mapped campaigns, severity chart.

name: LogLens — SIEM Log Correlator
origin: Written to cut down the time spent eyeballing raw log exports when looking for lateral movement patterns.
description: A Bash/Python pipeline for parsing and correlating SIEM log exports. Identifies anomalous login patterns, privilege escalations, and lateral movement indicators.
